workOrder.summary: Link Operations Evidence Missing to scoped category=evidence and readiness=missing worklist rows.

selectionReason: The prior handoff asked for a missing-submission or evidence drill-down. Current source showed Review Queue and Student Directory still lack exact missing/evidence filters, while Operations already supports scoped category and readiness filters for evidence-missing rows.
repoEvidence: functions/_lib/site-operations-readiness.ts already computed readinessCategory=evidence with readinessStatus=missing when evidence or submission progress is missing.
workspace.js already synced Operations category and readiness filters into URL state.
functions/_lib/site-review-queue.ts only allows status/program/search/story/risk filters, so adding a Review Queue missing-evidence button would be unsupported.

candidateSummary.decision: deferred: route does not support a missing/evidence param
deferred: directory has no exact evidence-missing filter
next recommended after the Operations drill-down

privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor assignment, or student privacy boundary was broadened.
The new metric uses the existing read-only Operations route and existing scoped filters.
No staff-only comments, raw storage identifiers, secrets, migrations, deploys, remote writes, domain/OAuth, or Cloudflare config changes were added.

validationResult.notes: Full closeout validation passed; git diff --check reported CRLF normalization warnings only.

nextRecommendedWorkOrder: Improve Viewer read-only homepage/worklist language now that the Operations evidence-missing drill-down is route-backed.
